pkgmetadata.longdescription: pkce (Proof Key for Code Exchange)Simple Python module to generate PKCE code verifier and code challenge. Installationbashpip install pkce Usagepython import pkce code_verifier, code_challenge pkce.generate_pkce_pair()python import pkce code_verifier pkce.generate_code_verifier(length128) code_challenge pkce.get_code_challenge(code_verifier) Additional informationSpec for the PKCE protocol can be found [here](httpstools.ietf.orghtmlrfc7636).
